WorkItem.Description:
Thanks for the great work. 

Please create a nuget package, so we can utilize this plugin in our automated build system.

Thanks.

Comments.Message:
I tried creating one, but since I have zero experience with NuGet whatsoever, I cannot be certain that it works.

Sven

Publishing a NuGet package is not hard; see http://docs.nuget.org/docs/creating-packages/creating-and-publishing-a-package

Basically, run  nuget spec  in the csproj directory, edit the generated file, build your project in Release mode, and run  nuget pack -Prop Configuration=Release .

See also http://www.hanselman.com/blog/UpdatingAndPublishingANuGetPackagePlusMakingNuGetPackagesSmarterAndAvoidingSourceEditsWithWebActivator.aspx

Thanks!

I have done as you said. Could you confirm?

Sven
Great! Can you please post a link somewhere on [homepage](https://multiparse.codeplex.com/) or [wiki/documentation](https://multiparse.codeplex.com/documentation). 8-)

I have put a link up on the homepage, as you requested.

Thank you for your input,
Sven
